template_module.title: GOV.UK Component Code Template
template_module.description: Template for generating code to implement a specific GOV.UK component. The assistant should reference the `govuk-frontend` macros and produce either HTML or Nunjucks snippets that adhere to the design system rules.

body.instruction: Generate a code snippet that implements the "{{component}}" component using the GOV.UK Frontend library in the specified language ({{language}}). Follow these steps:

checklist.entry: Identify the correct GOV.UK class or Nunjucks macro for the component.
Include required attributes and content (for example, labels, hint text, options).
Provide fallbacks or guidance when JavaScript is unavailable.
Comment on any accessibility considerations relevant to the component.

body.instruction: Include citations from the GOV.UK Design System or `govuk-frontend` repository to support the implementation choices. If the component is not yet defined in the reference, state that a generic implementation is provided.
